steps.title: Use the given cosine ratio
steps.content:
Since angle $M$ is a right angle, side $NP$ is the hypotenuse. The given value
$$\cos(N)=\frac{30}{78}$$
means the leg adjacent to angle $N$ is $30$ and the hypotenuse is $78$.

steps.title: Compute cosine of angle P
steps.content:
For angle $P$, the adjacent leg is the leg of length $72$, and the hypotenuse is $78$:
$$\cos(P)=\frac{72}{78}=\frac{12}{13}$$
The answer is 12/13.
